title: Matthew Bourne's Swan Lake
notes: 30th anniversary tour ("The Next Generation" cast). All-male swans.
review: Mum took me out for my birthday. Absolutely fantastic; Matthew Bourne is an incredible choreographer; I loved all the modern twists on this classic.
full_description: Bourne's reinvention of Tchaikovsky's masterpiece caused a sensation when it premiered almost 30 years ago, replacing the female corps-de-ballet with a menacing male ensemble, and has since become the most successful dance theatre production of all time. Thrilling, bold, witty and emotive — this is Swan Lake as you've never seen it before.
ai_summary: Matthew Bourne's landmark reimagining of Swan Lake — now in its 30th anniversary tour — replaces the traditional female swans with a menacing male corps, transforming Tchaikovsky's score into a bold, darkly funny, and emotionally devastating dance theatre experience.
